user.title: Legrand Digital Audio
user.description: Select a device discovered on your network, or choose manual entry. Port 2112 is used automatically.

manual.title: Legrand Digital Audio
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Legrand Digital Audio distribution module (AU7000). The port is 2112 on known hardware; only change it if your device uses a different control port.

discovery_confirm.title: Legrand Digital Audio
discovery_confirm.description: A Legrand Digital Audio device was found at {host}. Do you want to add it?

ssdp_confirm.title: Legrand Digital Audio
ssdp_confirm.description: Found a Legrand AU7001 streaming zone: {name}. Do you want to add it as a media player?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Make sure the device is reachable on port 2112.
